data.title: Dataknox Solutions celebrates 5 years with 400% growth under Ankush Dham's leadership. Global IT leader.
data.description: Dataknox Solutions, led by CEO Ankush Dham, has experienced significant growth, expanding by an impressive 400% to become a prominent global player. Established in Newark, California, on September 24, 2025, Dataknox Solutions has flourished under Dham's leadership, thanks to its distinct full-lifecycle IT infrastructure strategy. Over the past five years, since its inception, the company has made remarkable strides in the industry.

data.title: Skagit Valley Casino partners with Seattle Entertainment Group, Snoqualmie Casino & Little Creek Casino in alliance to improve tribal entertainment.
data.description: On September 24, 2025, the Skagit Valley Casino Resort announced a partnership with Seattle Entertainment Group (SEG), teaming up with Snoqualmie Casino & Hotel and Little Creek Casino Resort in a significant alliance aimed at reducing expenses and enhancing tribal entertainment. This collaboration aims to benefit from shared resources and expertise to improve operations and provide top-notch entertainment experiences for guests. The alliance between these casinos marks a major move in the industry to streamline operations and enhance the overall guest experience.

data.title: Vivani Medical (NASDAQ: VANI) to present at Emerging Growth Conference 86 on September 25, 2025 in California.
data.description: On September 24, 2025, Vivani Medical, Inc. (NASDAQ: VANI), a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical firm specializing in miniature, ultra long-acting drug implants, revealed its participation in the Emerging Growth Conference 86 scheduled for September 25, 2025. The company will be presenting at the event.

data.title: Worldcoin (WLD) is at $1.34 amidst mixed signals; gains 1.13%. Technical analysis: neutral momentum below moving averages.
data.description: The price of WLD remains steady at $1.34, showing a daily increase of 1.13% even in the face of a bearish MACD divergence. A technical analysis of Worldcoin indicates a neutral momentum as the token is currently being traded below important moving averages.

data.title: Global Fresh Food E-Commerce market grew at 14.73% CAGR from 2021-2024, valued at USD 162.29 Billion. Detailed report available.
data.description: A recent report titled "Global Fresh Food E-Commerce Market (2025 Edition)" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The market displayed a significant growth rate, with a CAGR of 14.73% from 2021 to 2024. Valued at USD 162.29 billion, the market analysis covers various product types such as Fish, Meat & Egg, Dairy Products, Fruits and Vegetables, Chilled Products, and Others. The report examines market trends by age, delivery model, region, and country, providing insights and forecasts for the period 2021-2031.

data.title: Women Applying AI (WAAI) launches at Boston AI Week to empower women in AI; event on Sept 26 at Microsoft's NERD Center.
data.description: A nonprofit organization called Women Applying AI (WAAI) has been launched in Boston, with an event held on September 26 at Microsoft’s New England Research and Development Center. The group's goal is to empower women to utilize and lead in artificial intelligence, helping them take charge in AI adoption and leadership roles. Described as more than just a community, WAAI is seen as a movement aiming to advance women in AI, with a focus on enabling them to actively participate and lead in their careers and communities.

data.title: TNF Pharmaceuticals rebrands to Q/C Technologies, trading as “QCLS” on Nasdaq from Sep 25, 2025, shifting focus to Quantum Class Photonic Computing.
data.description: New York - TNF Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: TNFA) has officially changed its name to Q/C Technologies, Inc. The company will now be trading under the ticker symbol "QCLS" on the Nasdaq Capital Market starting from Thursday, September 25, 2025. Until the official change, the common stock will still be trading under the former ticker symbol "TNFA." This rebranding reflects the Company's strategic shift.

data.title: HDI Global USA names Todd Spight as new CISO; provides cybersecurity leadership for HDI Global Insurance Company.
data.description: In Chicago, HDI Global Insurance Company has announced the appointment of Todd Spight as its new Chief Information Security Officer. HGIC, a leading insurance provider, has chosen Spight to oversee all aspects of information security within the company. This hiring comes as part of HGIC's ongoing commitment to fortifying its cybersecurity measures. Spight will be responsible for implementing strategies to safeguard HGIC's data and systems, ensuring the protection of sensitive information. This move signifies HGIC's dedication to maintaining robust security protocols in the face of increasing cyber threats.

data.title: Lumentum introduces R64 Optical Circuit Switch for AI data centers, featuring 64x64-port product at ECOC exhibition.
data.description: Lumentum Holdings Inc., a renowned global company specializing in optical and photonic technology, has revealed the introduction of the R64 platform to enhance its Optical Circuit Switch (OCS) product line. Utilizing Lumentum's established MEMS technology, this device will be initially available in a 64x64-port configuration, catering specifically to lower-port-count usages in AI data centers. The company is set to showcase the innovative product at the upcoming ECOC exhibition in Copenhagen, Denmark, scheduled from September 29 to October 1.

data.title: Prove and Backbase partner to streamline customer onboarding for US financial institutions with secure identity verification.
data.description: In New York, a strategic partnership has been revealed between Prove, a digital identity leader, and Backbase, a pioneering AI-powered banking platform. This partnership is set to revolutionize the process of customer onboarding for financial institutions in the United States. By combining seamless identity verification with a secure customer experience, the collaboration aims to tackle key issues in digital banking - fraud prevention and onboarding difficulties. Utilizing Prove Pre-Fill®, the integration promises to enhance efficiency and security in the onboarding process, marking a significant step forward in the industry.

data.title: Auctane appoints Josh Steinitz as Chief Strategy Officer, bringing expertise in logistics and global operations.
data.description: A global company based in Austin, Texas, Auctane, has appointed Josh Steinitz as its Chief Strategy Officer (CSO). Auctane provides intelligent mailing and shipping solutions through trusted products like ShipStation, Stamps.com, Metapack, and Packlink. Steinitz, known for his distinguished career in travel and logistics, aims to leverage his expertise in global operations, logistics, and partnerships to drive Auctane's strategic initiatives. This move is set to enhance Auctane's position in the market and capitalize on Steinitz's wealth of experience in the industry.

data.title: NiCE to host Capital Markets Day on Nov 17, 2025 in NYC at Convene 75 Rockefeller Plaza. Includes presentations on long-term strategy, CX Innovation Roadmap with Cognigy, and financial outlook.
data.description: NiCE (Nasdaq: NICE) will be holding a Capital Markets Day on November 17, 2025, at Convene 75 Rockefeller Plaza in New York City. The event will showcase presentations from the executive management team regarding the company's long-term strategy and the future of the CX market, the CX Innovation Roadmap with Cognigy, as well as a financial overview and mid-term outlook. For those interested in attending or seeking more information, please reach out for details.

data.title: Incredible Health introduces AI agents Gale and Lyn to revolutionize healthcare hiring, benefitting 1M+ workers and 1,500 employers.
data.description: A leading healthcare career marketplace, Incredible Health, based in San Francisco, introduced two AI voice agents named Gale and Lyn, aimed at revolutionizing healthcare hiring processes. These agents are tailored to enhance the hiring experience for healthcare workers and employers by providing personalized, dependable, and swift services. With the support of over 1 million nurses and technicians in the U.S. and 1,500 healthcare employers, these AI agents are set to transform the recruitment landscape. Trusted AI technology is utilized to streamline hiring processes on the platform.
Vox set to raise $55M in public offering for common shares.

data.title: LiverRight Announces Medical Advisory Board and Founding Members
data.description: Cincinnati, September 24, 2025 - LiverRight, the nation's exclusive National Virtual Clinic focused on diagnosing and treating liver diseases in adult patients, has recently appointed Naim Alkhouri, MD and Rashmee Patil, MD as advisors to enhance its services. This move comes as part of the clinic's ongoing effort to expand its expertise and improve patient care. LiverRight stands out as the only Virtual Clinic in the country dedicated to addressing liver ailments patients face, offering specialized medical attention.

data.title: New Energy Risk partners with Alliant for Texas solar project, expands into tax credit market.
data.description: Avon, Connecticut – A collaboration with Alliant has been established to back a solar project in Texas, signifying the extension of NER's insurance expertise into the tax credit sector.

data.title: Desay SV expands intelligent driving solutions to overseas markets; announces IPU14 domain controller at IAA Mobility 2025.
data.description: Desay SV, during the International Motor Show Germany on September 10, 2025, revealed plans to broaden its intelligent driving solutions globally. The company declared that its IPU14 domain controller will now be available in overseas markets. This move showcases Desay SV's commitment to expanding its reach beyond domestic boundaries.

data.title: Instabug rebrands as Luciq.ai, introducing Agentic Mobile Observability, shifting focus to proactive issue resolution.
data.description: In San Francisco, the prominent AI-powered mobile observability platform, Instabug, revealed its rebranding as Luciq.ai, introducing a fresh category named Agentic Mobile Observability. The company's transition signifies a shift from passive monitoring to an AI-centric platform where smart agents actively identify, troubleshoot, and address problems. This transformation allows mobile teams to prioritize enhancing user experiences by resolving issues efficiently. The new brand, pronounced as "LOO-sik," aims to emphasize this innovative approach in the industry.

data.title: ROI·DNA chosen as Qualtrics' global digital advertising partner, leading paid media strategy for growth and engagement.
data.description: In San Francisco, ROI·DNA, a Hotwire Global company and a full-service B2B digital marketing agency, revealed that it has secured the position of global digital advertising partner for Qualtrics, a prominent creator in the experience management (XM) category. This collaboration will involve ROI·DNA overseeing paid media strategy and implementation worldwide and in local markets to support Qualtrics in enhancing growth and improving connections with crucial target groups. Qualtrics opted for ROI·DNA after a rigorous selection process, highlighting the significant importance of this partnership.
